productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Unisex Black Dial Chronograph Watch ADH2571
description: Case style: Analogue watch, has a circular case with a fixed bezel, a stainless steel backDial style: Black dial, has hands and markingsFeatures: Three-faced chronograph display, two push-buttons to adjust settings, a screw to reset time, a date apertureStrap style: Black steel strap, secured with a butterfly claspWater-resistance up to 50 metresComes in a signature Adidas Original caseWarranty: 3 months from the date of purchase against manufacturing defects
